bot_presence.description: Bot presence / activity shown in the Discord member list.

data_repositories.description: Sources of data to index and search over.

max_results.description: Maximum number of search results returned per query.

search_weights.description: Fine-grained tuning knobs for the two-pass search scoring formula.

suggestion_header.description: Header message prepended to search suggestions posted in forum threads.

threshold.description:
Minimum TF-IDF cosine similarity score (0.0–1.0) for a result to be
included in search suggestions. Lower values return more results but
with less precision.

ActivityKind.description: Activity type shown next to the bot name in the Discord member list.

BotPresence.description: Bot presence shown in the Discord member list on startup.

activity.description: Activity type: playing, watching, listening, or competing.

message.description: The text displayed next to the activity type (e.g. "for questions").

status.description: Online status: online, dnd, idle, or invisible.

DataRepositories.description: All data sources the bot indexes and searches over.

discord_forums.description: Discord forum channels to sync threads and messages from.

git_docs.description:
Git repositories to clone and index documentation from.
Any git-accessible URL is supported (not just GitHub).

github_issues.description:
GitHub repositories to sync issues and releases from.
Issues and releases are fetched via the GitHub REST API.

DiscordForum.description: A Discord forum channel whose threads and messages are synced and searched.

channel_id.description: Discord Channel ID of the forum channel as a string snowflake.

guild_id.description: Discord Guild (server) ID as a string snowflake.

reply.description: When `true`, the bot posts search suggestions in reply to new threads.

weight.description: Score multiplier applied to all search results from this forum.

DocSet.description: A single documentation directory within a cloned git repository.

path.description: Path to the docs directory relative to the repository root (e.g. `"./docs"`).

url_mapping.description: URL mappings that translate local file paths to public web URLs.

GitDocsSource.description: A git repository to clone locally and index documentation files from.

docs.description: Documentation paths within the cloned repository to index.

repository.description:
Full git clone URL (e.g. `"https://github.com/Skidamek/AutoModpack.git"`).
Any git-accessible URL works — GitHub, GitLab, self-hosted, etc.

weight.description:
Score multiplier applied to all search results from this repository's docs.
Use values > 1.0 to surface these docs above issues/threads of equal relevance.

GithubIssueSource.description: A GitHub repository whose issues and releases are synced via the API.

weight.description:
Score multiplier applied to all search results from this repository.
Use values > 1.0 to surface this repo's results higher, < 1.0 to suppress them.

SearchWeights.description:
Tuning knobs for the two-pass search scoring formula.

**Pass 1 — base score** (computed per candidate before filtering):
```text
relevance   = TF-IDF cosine similarity between query and candidate   ∈ [0, 1]
version_wt  = 1 / (1 + semantic_version_distance × version_distance_scale)
source_wt   = per-entry weight from data_repositories config

base_score  = relevance × version_wt × source_wt
```

**Pass 2 — recency blend** (applied after threshold filtering):
```text
recency      = (updated_at − oldest_updated_at) / time_span   ∈ [0, 1]
recency_mult = recency_base + recency_influence × recency      ∈ [recency_base, recency_base + recency_influence]

final_score  = base_score × recency_mult
```

version_distance_scale.description:
Steepness of the version-distance decay curve.
Higher → stronger preference for same-version results.
Lower  → version proximity matters less.

version_index_distance_scale.description:
Decay steepness used when release tags cannot be parsed to SemVer.
The fallback distance is normalised to [0, 1] by index size, so this
scale is comparable across projects with different release cadences.

version_major_penalty.description:
Penalty per major-version difference (e.g. v1.x vs v2.x).
Large value: results from a different major version score much lower.

version_minor_penalty.description: Penalty per minor-version difference (e.g. v1.0 vs v1.2).

version_patch_penalty.description:
Penalty per patch-version difference (e.g. v1.0.0 vs v1.0.3).
Small value: patch differences have minimal effect on ranking.

UrlMapping.description: Translates a local file path prefix to a public URL prefix.

to.description: Public URL prefix to replace it with (e.g. `"https://example.com/docs"`).
